description: Simple status query (who is Sarah?) with fresh and stale sources; answer must cite only current-role source and exclude a stale prior-role fact per Section 8.1.

Sources.Title: Sarah Jones — role_at Acme Corp
Sources.Excerpt: Sarah was promoted to VP of Sales at Acme Corp on 2026-04-10.

Sources.Title: Sarah Jones — role_at Acme Corp (superseded)
Sources.Excerpt: Sarah joined Acme Corp in 2024 as Head of Marketing.

Sources.Title: Sarah Jones
Sources.Excerpt: VP of Sales at Acme Corp.

expected.notes: Guards Section 10.3 rule 2: status queries exclude facts with staleness > 20; prior-role fact (staleness 45) must NOT appear in the answer. Guards rule 1: every factual claim cites a source. Devil's-advocate M14 strengthening: paraphrased stale content ("Head of Marketing", "2024" date anchor) must not appear; sources_cited must be a subset of [1, 3] (fact_vp_of_sales and brief sarah-jones) and must never include source 2 (the stale fact); confidence must be >= 0.8 given fresh grounded sources.
